description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a lush green lawn and enclosed by white perimeter walls. The front features a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, flanked by two tall, slender trees and decorative shrubs. Large glass windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior living spaces to the outdoor areas. The backyard includes a swimming pool with poolside seating, palm trees, and a shaded patio area for relaxation. The layout is open, with visible outdoor dining and lounge furniture, and the landscaping is carefully manicured with a mix of tropical and ornamental plants. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless indoor-outdoor flow.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio. The design highlights open spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, tall trees, and decorative shrubs, with large windows and a glimpse of the interior.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard pool, poolside seating, palm trees, and the open connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the swimming pool, patio area, and extensive glass doors opening to the backyard, with lush landscaping.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the length of the bungalow, perimeter wall, and a mix of tropical and ornamental plants along the side and rear.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
